title: wrong example in `podman machine set` help
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

`podman machine help` shows an invalid example command

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run `podman machine set --help`

```
$ podman machine set --help
Sets a virtual machine setting

Description:
  Sets an updatable virtual machine setting

Usage:
  podman machine set [options] [NAME]

Examples:
  podman machine set --root=false

Options:
      --rootful   Whether this machine should prefer rootful container execution
```

There is an example saying : try `podman machine set --root=false`

Try to run this example

```
$ podman machine set --root=false
```

**Describe the results you received:**
See the error

```
Error: unknown flag: --root
See 'podman machine set --help'
```


**Describe the results you expected:**
help command should show as example `--rootful` option

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
4.0.2
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/ea08765f400d828907f231baa84bd880a00d95f1/cmd/podman/machine/set.go#L20

Yes/No

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
